question: What is Vertex Labs?
answer: Vertex Labs is a precision-grade web development studio that builds premium websites and digital products for businesses. We specialise in website development, AI solutions, SaaS products, and custom software — delivering high-quality digital experiences at competitive prices.

question: How can I contact Vertex Labs?
answer: You can reach us at **vertex.labs.offical@gmail.com** or through our Contact page. We respond within 24 hours and offer a free consultation with no commitment.

question: Where is Vertex Labs located?
answer: Vertex Labs serves clients across India and internationally. We work remotely and collaborate with clients anywhere in the world.

question: How long does it take to build a website?
answer:
Project timelines vary by complexity:
• Starter Website: 3–5 days
• Business Website: 1–2 weeks
• Premium Website: 2–4 weeks
• Custom Solutions: 4–8 weeks

We'll give you an exact timeline during your free consultation.

question: What technologies does Vertex Labs use?
answer:
We use modern, industry-standard technologies:

**Frontend:** React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
**Backend:** Node.js, Express, Python, FastAPI
**Database:** PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Supabase
**AI/ML:** LangChain, OpenAI integrations, TensorFlow
**Deployment:** Vercel, Netlify, AWS, Docker

question: Do you offer revisions after delivery?
answer:
Yes! All our packages include revision rounds:
• Starter: 1 revision round
• Business: 2 revision rounds
• Premium: 3 revision rounds
• Custom: Unlimited revisions during the project

question: What are your payment terms?
answer:
We accept UPI, bank transfer, and online payments.

Typical terms:
• 50% advance to start the project
• 50% on delivery

For Custom Solutions, we discuss milestone-based payment schedules.

question: Do you offer post-launch support?
answer: Yes! We offer post-launch support for all projects. Custom Solutions include dedicated post-launch support. For other plans, we offer affordable monthly maintenance packages. Reach out at vertex.labs.offical@gmail.com for details.

question: Do you offer a free consultation?
answer: Absolutely! We offer a free consultation with no commitment. Just fill out our contact form or email vertex.labs.offical@gmail.com and we'll get back to you within 24 hours with a custom quote.
